---
title: "largest_connected_component"
generated: true
description: "Boolean mask of the single largest connected foreground region."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.morphology`](../nitrix-morphology.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.morphology._label`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:largest_connected_component -->
```python
largest_connected_component(mask: Bool[Array, '*spatial'], *, connectivity: int = 1) -> Bool[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:largest_connected_component -->
Boolean mask of the single largest connected foreground region.

Labels the connected foreground regions of `mask` (via
[`connected_components`](../nitrix-morphology/connected_components.qmd)) and keeps only the component with the
most voxels; ties are broken towards the lowest label.  An empty input
(no foreground) yields an all-`False` mask.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:largest_connected_component -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `mask` | `Bool` | `*spatial` | — | Boolean (or 0/1) array of shape `(*spatial)`; non-zero entries are foreground. |
| `connectivity` | `int` | — | `1` | Neighbourhood order in $[1, \mathrm{ndim}]$: `1` selects face neighbours only, while `ndim` includes every diagonal. Follows scipy's $\sum \|\mathrm{offset}\| \leq \mathrm{connectivity}$ rule. |

**Returns** `Bool` — shape `*spatial`. Boolean array of the same shape as `mask` that is `True` only on the single largest connected foreground component, and `False` everywhere else (including everywhere when `mask` has no foreground).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:largest_connected_component -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
